commit_scope: Close the Field Model Form public-proof gap by adding a stable FMF proof marker to the browser-local playground example and extending public deploy verification to fail unless /substrate/form serves the FMF proof label and source markers from the page shell or referenced Next.js chunks.

commands: cd web && npx tsx -e 'import { LOCAL_FORM_EXAMPLES, runLocalFormBinary } from "./lib/form-kernel/client"; const ex = LOCAL_FORM_EXAMPLES.find((item) => item.label === "Field Model Form proof"); if (!ex) throw new Error("missing FMF example"); const run = runLocalFormBinary(ex.source); console.log(JSON.stringify({ label: ex.label, marker: ex.proofMarker, result: run.result })); if (run.result !== "93" || ex.proofMarker !== "field-model-form-public-proof:93") process.exit(1);'
local_validation.summary: Prompt guide passed in a fresh linked worktree. The deploy verifier is syntactically valid. The FMF browser-local example returns 93 and carries field-model-form-public-proof:93. The shared .fk FMF band still returns 93 across sibling kernels. Next production build passes after installing declared web dependencies; the build contains the FMF label, marker, proof function, and field_blueprint constructor in generated chunks. The focused web form-kernel test passes.

ci_validation.details: Pending push, PR creation, and GitHub Actions checks.

deploy_validation.environment: pending merge to main and Hostinger deploy

phase_gate.blocked_reason: Local proof is complete. Public proof becomes complete only after the PR is merged, Hostinger rebuilds the web container, and scripts/verify_web_api_deploy.sh passes against https://coherencycoin.com/substrate/form.

evidence_refs: cd web && npx tsx -e '<FMF local example returns 93 and marker field-model-form-public-proof:93>'

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A public deploy cannot pass while the Form playground is missing the FMF 93-point proof example. The verifier now scans the live route and its Next.js chunks for the FMF label, stable proof marker, proof function, and field constructor.
test_flows: Browser-local FMF example executes through runLocalFormBinary and returns 93.
Next production build includes Field Model Form proof, field-model-form-public-proof:93, fmf-proof-score, and field_blueprint in generated chunks.
Post-merge public deploy must run scripts/verify_web_api_deploy.sh, which fails if the public /substrate/form shell and chunks do not contain those FMF proof markers.
